text.title: Multi-Region Active-Active Pattern Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for multi-region-active-active-pattern showing inputs, rule application, and final artefact.

example.title: Global SaaS — 3-region active-active with residency partitions

good.description: EU users → eu-central-1 ∥ eu-west-3; US users → us-east-1 ∥ us-west-2. Per-data-class conflict policy. Replication-lag SLI <500ms. Quarterly drill. Residency-aware steering.

bad.description: All users → wherever DNS lands. LWW conflict policy. Drill never run. First failover takes 47 minutes; EU user data ends up in US region.
